title: IBM India International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: IBM India International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
We at IBM India International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About IBM India International Enterprises:
IBM India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IBM India International Enterprises!
